There is no implementation of dry-run testing functionality, no maintainability features (such as logging, configuration for dry-run mode, test coverage, or documentation), and no code that supports testing the system's maintainability. The code is essentially a skeleton with no relevant logic.

Severity: high

ACTION: Implement REQ-005 according to the spec.
